zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John St-Barbe於1320年出生在英國薩默塞特布倫特 諾爾時，他的父親Sir Richard Saint-Barbe II20歲，母親Lady Margaret Furneaux18歲。他於1355年之前與Margaret de Longland在英國薩默塞特布倫特 諾爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1940年在英國薩默塞特可希頓被列為parson 。他去世於大約1404年在英國英格蘭薩默塞特布倫特 諾爾享年85歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John St-Barbe于1320年出生在英国薩默塞特布倫特 諾爾时，他的父亲Sir Richard Saint-Barbe II20岁，母亲Lady Margaret Furneaux18岁。他于1355年之前与Margaret de Longland在英国薩默塞特布倫特 諾爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1940年在英国薩默塞特可希頓被列为parson 。他去世于大约1404年在英国英格兰薩默塞特布倫特 諾爾享年85岁。

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John St-Barbe was born in 1320, in Brent Knoll, Somerset, England, his father, Sir Richard Saint-Barbe II, was 20 and his mother, Lady Margaret Furneaux, was 18. He married Margaret de Longland before 1355, in Brent Knoll, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. In 1940, his occupation is listed as parson  in Cossington, Somerset, England. He died about 1404, in Brent Knoll, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 85.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John St-Barbe est né en 1320, à Brent Knoll, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Saint-Barbe II, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Furneaux, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Margaret de Longland avant 1355, à Brent Knoll, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. En 1940, sa profession de son indiquée est parson  à Cossington, Somerset, Angleterre. Il est décédé environ 1404, à Brent Knoll, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 85 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John St-Barbe 1320 in Brent Knoll, Somerset, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Richard Saint-Barbe II 20 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret Furneaux 18. Er hat vor 1355 in Brent Knoll, Somerset, England Margaret de Longland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. 1940 ist sein Beruf als parson  in Cossington, Somerset, England aufgeführt. Er starb um 1404 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Brent Knoll, Somerset, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John St-Barbe è nato il nel 1320 nel Brent Knoll, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Sir Richard Saint-Barbe II, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret Furneaux, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Margaret de Longland prima del 1355, nel Brent Knoll, Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Nel 1940, la sua occupazione è indicata come parson  nel Cossington, Somerset, England. Morì circa 1404, nel Brent Knoll, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 85 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John St-Barbeが1320年にイギリスソメルセトブレント ノルで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Saint-Barbe IIは20歳，母Lady Margaret Furneauxは18歳であった。1355年以前にイギリスソメルセトブレント ノルでMargaret de Longlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。1940年，イギリスソメルセトコシントンでの職業はparson と記録されている。彼は約1404年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトブレント ノルで85歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John St-Barbe(이)가 1320년 영국 서머세트 브렌트 노에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richard Saint-Barbe II(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Furneaux(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1355년 이전 영국 서머세트 브렌트 노에서 Margaret de Longland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1940년, 그의 직업은 영국 서머세트 코징턴에서 parson 이었다. 그는 대략 1404년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 브렌트 노에서 85세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John St-Barbe nasceu em 1320, em Brent Knoll, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Saint-Barbe II, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Lady Margaret Furneaux, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret de Longland antes 1355, em Brent Knoll, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Em 1940, sua profissão aparece como parson  em Cossington, Somerset, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1404, em Brent Knoll, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 85 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John St-Barbe родился в 1320 г. в местности брент нолл, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Richard Saint-Barbe II было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Furneaux, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret de Longland перед 1355 г. в местности брент нолл, сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. В 1940 году он работал по профессии parson  в местности коссингтон, сомирсет, Англия. Он умер около 1404 г. в местности брент нолл, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 85 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John St-Barbe nació en 1320, en Brent Knoll, Somerset, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Saint-Barbe II, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Lady Margaret Furneaux, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Margaret de Longland antes de 1355, en Brent Knoll, Somerset, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. En 1940, su ocupación registrada era parson  en Cossington, Somerset, Inglaterra. Murió aproximadamente 1404, en Brent Knoll, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 85 años.
